user_prompt: give calling `tools\sterile_rebuild.py` a try for when the iram0 overflow happens
agent_reply: Yep, the sterile rebuild worked for the `thefly_sec1` IRAM overflow case.

I ran `python tools\sterile_rebuild.py -e thefly_sec1` with elevated access after the sandbox run hit PlatformIO home-directory permissions. It cleaned `.pio/build`, removed `sdkconfig.*`, regenerated config, rebuilt from scratch, and finished with exit code `0`.

One side effect to note: the script removed all `sdkconfig.*` files, then regenerated only `sdkconfig.defaults` and `sdkconfig.thefly_sec1`. The other environment sdkconfigs should come back when those envs are rebuilt.
